visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a warehouse-style retail environment. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and a long black skirt, stands in an aisle with tall orange metal shelves stacked with red and green boxes. She holds two large red Starbucks coffee variety packs. Large text overlays and a brand logo are present at the top. (2) The camera moves closer to one of the boxes held by the woman. The box is red with a green festive design, labeled 'Welcome Joy Home' with the Starbucks logo. A hand points to specific coffee sleeves depicted on the packaging, highlighting 'Toffee Nut' and 'Pike Place' flavors. (3) The shot returns to the woman holding both boxes, gesturing toward the camera as she talks. She shifts the boxes slightly to show different sides. The background remains the bright, industrial setting of a large store with high ceilings and shelf price tags. (4) The woman rotates one of the boxes to show the side and back details, then holds up a second, similar box that features different graphics (Nescafe logo). The lighting is bright and even, typical of a supermarket. (5) A close-up shot focuses on a price tag on a shelf, showing the number 1,279 in large font, next to smaller text and a barcode. The woman then places the boxes back into a display tray on the shelf.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 聖誕限量. [Slogan]: 21元喝到星巴克太妃核. [Variety]: 這個呢. (2) [Variety]: 是只有聖誕. [Subtitle]: 應該說是冬天才會出現的. [Slogan]: Nespresso 咖啡膠囊. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多一個領先瑪麗亞·凱莉過耶誕節的人. [Variety]: 太妃核果風味. [Subtitle]: 超好喝, 比星巴克買還好喝. (4) [Variety]: 甜度更低. [Variety]: 好吃到不行. [Variety]: 香氣滿滿. (5) [Subtitle]: 1,279 所以一顆是 21塊錢 價格是蠻便宜的.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white sleeveless top with a dark ribbon detail and a high-waisted long black skirt with a ruffled hem and black Mary Jane shoes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse store aisle (Costco) with tall orange industrial racking, wooden pallets, and stacks of red Starbucks-branded product boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy pop BGM with a clear electronic beat begins. A female voice with a friendly tone introduces a product at Costco. (2) A bright 'Ding' SFX triggers as text appears. A male voice joins, speaking at a moderate pace, describing the Starbucks coffee flavors. (3) The female voice responds to a question with a higher pitch and playful laugh. The BGM remains steady with synthesized textures. (4) Short 'Pop' SFX accompany visual shifts. The male narrator explains the price breakdown and compares the value to buying individual cups. (5) The BGM swells slightly as the male voice concludes with a recommendation, maintaining high clarity and a positive emotional valence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Product Detail -> Comparison/Value Analysis -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a seasonal Starbucks coffee capsule variety pack available at Costco Taiwan, highlighting its cost-effectiveness (21 TWD per capsule) and specific festive flavors to encourage shoppers to purchase it during the winter season.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, price breakdown, and strong positive recommendation of Starbucks/Nespresso products within a Costco environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media shopping vlog aesthetics, including on-screen subtitles and variety-show style captions, to create a relatable consumer recommendation.
